title: Xtra Nutty Thai Papaya Som Tum
description: A nutty and chewy Thai dish featuring Jamaican curry powder, this Som Tum is a festive and flavorful twist on traditional papaya salad, with a creamy emulsified dressing. It is dash-friendly and perfect for a quick and delicious meal.

ingredients.name: dried shrimp
ingredients.notes: optional, but recommended for authentic flavor

ingredients.name: fish sauce
ingredients.notes: use high-quality fish sauce for best flavor

ingredients.name: chilies
ingredients.notes: use Thai bird's eye chilies for authentic heat

instructions: In a large mortar and pestle, pound the chilies and peanuts until well combined and fragrant.
Add the dried shrimp, if using, and pound until well combined.
Add the shredded green papaya and pound until it starts to break down and release its juices.
In a small bowl, whisk together the fish sauce, lime juice, and palm sugar until well combined.
Add the Jamaican curry powder to the bowl and whisk until smooth and emulsified.
Pour the dressing over the papaya mixture and pound until well coated.
Taste and adjust the seasoning as needed.
Transfer the Som Tum to a serving platter and garnish with additional peanuts and chilies, if desired.
